system.description:
Time: The adventurer must spend the entire region undertaking this activity.

A character can make a check using Alchemist's Supplies, Arcana, or Religion to locate a substance known as Cabbac's Third Eye. This is the name of a fungal infection which affects nearly any kind of plant. While somewhat rare, its spores drift on the wind and are found in most regions and types of terrain.

Cabbac’s Third Eye can extend uses of minor magical items:

  • Rub it over a common magic item to recover 1 charge

  • Add it to 1 common potion to stretch it to 2 uses

  • Rub the fungus on a common spell scroll to get +1 use before the scroll is consumed

Note that the application of Cabbac’s Third Eye must occur within 24 hours of harvesting, but once applied an unspent extended use will last for 1 month.

journeyProperties.criticalFailure: The adventurer accidentally picks the look-alike fungus, Cat Lord's Paw. This species immediately consumes magic from any object it is applied to, burning through rather than extending the intended charge, potion, or scroll.
journeyProperties.failure: The adventurer finds none of the fungus.
journeyProperties.success: The adventurer finds enough of Cabbac’s Third Eye for a single use.
journeyProperties.criticalSuccess: The adventurer finds enough of the fungus for 1d2 + 1 uses.
